notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Sal Frelick to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya grounds into a double play, third baseman Luis Rengifo to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Dansby Swanson out at 2nd. Miguel Amaya out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Luis Rengifo. Miguel Amaya scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Ian Happ to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Luis Rengifo. Miguel Amaya scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Ian Happ to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto grounds into a force out, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz. Seiya Suzuki out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly grounds out, shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch reaches on a fielder's choice. Nico Hoerner to 2nd. Nico Hoerner advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop David Hamilton.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Ben Brown. Jackson Chourio scores. William Contreras to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Sal Frelick reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Sal Frelick to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Cubs challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: David Hamilton steals (10) 2nd base.

notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Luis Rengifo. Miguel Amaya scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Ian Happ to 2nd.
